metadata.description: Global benchmark defaults and inflation rates for ecommerce financial modeling

source.title: Google Ads Benchmarks 2024-2025
source.snippet: Average CPC increased 10-13% in 2024; long-term CAGR approximately 4-6%

cpc_inflation.notes: Conservative 6% for multi-year modeling; actual can be 10%+ in competitive verticals

source.title: FedEx, UPS announce 2025 rate increases averaging 5.9%
source.snippet: UPS and FedEx announced average rate increases of 5.9% effective January 2025

shipping_inflation.notes: Annual GRI (General Rate Increase) typically 5-7%; USPS increases similar

source.title: U.S. Industrial MarketBeat Q3 2025
source.snippet: Industrial rent growth moderating to 2-4% after pandemic surge

rent_inflation.notes: Returning to historical norms of 2-4% after 2021-2023 surge

source.title: Ecommerce Fulfillment Costs: What to Expect
source.snippet: Pick and pack typically runs $2-3 per order, roughly 15-25% of shipping cost

handling_cost_multiplier.notes: Pick and pack labor as percentage of shipping cost; 20% is industry standard
